segments.text: Hey yo,
why the broom moving by itself?
Brooms in the boiler room
Brooms in the boiler room
Water starts to rise
Little mouse grinning with the stars in his eyes
Brooms in the boiler room
Knockin' at the door
Spell got loose
And they're hungry for more
Black and white world
But the money's still gold
Whole tower shakin' when the wild drums roll
Brooms in the boiler room
Moon turn blue
One more time
Wrong spell and the hope through doom
I came through small with the hat pulled low
Stars on the brim and the gloves still glow
Strings go stab but swoon go low
Broom got the bucket and it march like whoa
Told me don't cut so I touched back quick
Now the whole tower sick and the floorboards shift
One broom, two brooms, three more rise
Black ink magic in the cartoon eyes
Symphony boom when the stairwell crack
Hobo line howlin' and the shadows clap back
Moonlight bends when the wand goes snap
Shadow on the wall
With the long-eared cap
I ain't scared
I'm just deep in the trick
Too much power for a little dude slick
Black and white frame but the gold still gleam
Money in the fog and the magic in steam
Who cast that?
Not me
Who touched the hat?
Not me
Who flooded the room?
Couldn't be me
Then why the broom got a whole army?
Brooms in the boiler room
Water starts to rise
Little mouse grinning with the stars in his eyes
Brooms in the boiler room
Knockin' at the door
Spell got loose
And they're hungry for more
Black and white world but the money still gold
Whole tower shakin' when the wild drums roll
Brooms in the boiler room
Moon turn blue
One wrong spell and the whole crew doomed
I seen the mop grow teeth in the midnight haze
Seen buckets pour rivers to a hundred stairways
Spidey laughin'
Trumpets go crooked
Whole magic tower lookin' haunted and flooded
Old wizard gone
But the hat stayed watchin'
Every little sparkle turned toxic
Broomstick army with the wooden leg stomp
Tap dance terror when the bass line goes off
Broomstick army with the wooden leg stomp
I told little homie
You don't know that spell
He said I know enough to make the whole room swell
Then the strings start chasin' ceiling got eyes
Stars in the robe started fallin' from the sky
Cauldron bubble floorboards split
One more chant and the whole place flip
Magic ain't cute when the shadows get tall
Especially when the mouse got control of it all
They said he was just an apprentice
Apprentice
Yeah
Then why the broom salutin' him
Broom's In The Boiler Room
Hat too big
Spell too strong
Room too wild
Night too long
Water too high
Door won't move
